input.command:
cd /tmp; python3 2>&1 <<'EOF' | grep -vi 'Missing\|not found\|repeated' | tail -40
import mteb, pandas as pd
b = mteb.get_benchmark('MTEB(Scandinavian, v1)')
tasknames = [t.metadata.name for t in b.tasks]
res = mteb.load_results(results_repo='/tmp/results', download_latest=False, tasks=b.tasks, require_model_meta=False, only_main_score=True)
res = res.join_revisions()
df = res.to_dataframe(aggregation_level='task', format='wide')
print(df.shape)
print(df.columns.tolist()[:5])
# identify model column
mcol = df.columns[0]
taskcols = [c for c in df.columns if c in tasknames]
print("num taskcols", len(taskcols))
# keep only models with all tasks
full = df.dropna(subset=taskcols)
full = full.copy()
full['MeanTask'] = full[taskcols].mean(axis=1)
full = full.sort_values('MeanTask', ascending=False)
print(full[[mcol,'MeanTask']].head(15).to_string())
EOF

input.command:
cd /tmp; python3 2>&1 <<'EOF' | grep -vi 'Missing\|not found\|repeated\|Warning\|apply\|pivot' | tail -30
import mteb, pandas as pd
b = mteb.get_benchmark('MTEB(Scandinavian, v1)')
res = mteb.load_results(results_repo='/tmp/results', download_latest=False, tasks=b.tasks, require_model_meta=False, only_main_score=True)
res = res.join_revisions()
df = res.to_dataframe(aggregation_level='task', format='wide')
df = df.set_index('task_name')
ntasks = df.shape[0]
print("ntasks", ntasks)
counts = df.notna().sum(axis=0)   # per model number of tasks
full_models = counts[counts==ntasks].index
means = df[full_models].mean(axis=0).sort_values(ascending=False)
print("num full models", len(full_models))
print(means.head(15).to_string())
EOF

content.text: Top model computed directly from the Aug 2025 results snapshot. Let me verify GritLM has genuine all-28 coverage and sanity-check the runner-up gap.

input.command:
cd /tmp; python3 2>&1 <<'EOF' | grep -vi 'Missing\|not found\|repeated\|Warning\|apply\|pivot' | tail -8
import mteb, pandas as pd
b = mteb.get_benchmark('MTEB(Scandinavian, v1)')
res = mteb.load_results(results_repo='/tmp/results', download_latest=False, tasks=b.tasks, require_model_meta=False, only_main_score=True).join_revisions()
df = res.to_dataframe(aggregation_level='task', format='wide').set_index('task_name')
g = df['GritLM/GritLM-7B']
print("GritLM non-null tasks:", g.notna().sum(), "of", df.shape[0])
print("GritLM MeanTask:", round(g.mean(),4))
EOF
echo -n "GritLM/GritLM-7B" > /app/result.txt; echo; echo "WROTE:"; cat /app/result.txt

content.text:
Done.

**Answer: `GritLM/GritLM-7B`** → written to `/app/result.txt`.

Method:
- `MTEB(Scandinavian, v1)` benchmark = 28 tasks (bitext/classification/retrieval/clustering across da/nb/sv).
- Loaded official results repo `embeddings-benchmark/results` at last Aug-2025 commit (`71f6b62`, 2025-08-29) → snapshot "as of August 2025".
- Aggregated main score per task (`join_revisions`, task-level), kept only models with all 28 tasks non-null (11 qualify).
- Highest Mean (Task): **GritLM/GritLM-7B = 0.6408**, ahead of e5-mistral-7b-instruct (0.6201) and multilingual-e5-large-instruct (0.6162).

Verification: GritLM confirmed 28/28 non-null; `/app/result.txt` = `GritLM/GritLM-7B` (no trailing newline).

Risk: assumes leaderboard "Mean (Task)" = unweighted mean of per-task main scores over the v1 task set (matches MTEB's own aggregation); if the intended snapshot month differs from end-of-August, GritLM was already present all snapshot dates in 2025 so top rank is stable.

result:
Done.

**Answer: `GritLM/GritLM-7B`** → written to `/app/result.txt`.

Method:
- `MTEB(Scandinavian, v1)` benchmark = 28 tasks (bitext/classification/retrieval/clustering across da/nb/sv).
- Loaded official results repo `embeddings-benchmark/results` at last Aug-2025 commit (`71f6b62`, 2025-08-29) → snapshot "as of August 2025".
- Aggregated main score per task (`join_revisions`, task-level), kept only models with all 28 tasks non-null (11 qualify).
- Highest Mean (Task): **GritLM/GritLM-7B = 0.6408**, ahead of e5-mistral-7b-instruct (0.6201) and multilingual-e5-large-instruct (0.6162).

Verification: GritLM confirmed 28/28 non-null; `/app/result.txt` = `GritLM/GritLM-7B` (no trailing newline).

Risk: assumes leaderboard "Mean (Task)" = unweighted mean of per-task main scores over the v1 task set (matches MTEB's own aggregation); if the intended snapshot month differs from end-of-August, GritLM was already present all snapshot dates in 2025 so top rank is stable.
